blocks.text: DTC P2715: Lock-up clutch control SOL.V.ON Stuck

The lock-up clutch control SOL.V. controls the hydraulic pressure applied to the lock-up clutch. The spool in the lock-up clutch control SOL.V. pushes a valve in response to the duty (load) output, which is converted to a current value by the PGM-FI ECU. As a result, the valve pushed by the spool releases oil pressure proportional to the current value. The PGM-FI ECU outputs a control signal for the lock-up clutch oil pressure for proper lock-up. After the primary lock-up clutch ON sticking judgment, if the lock-up clutch remains ON for a predetermined period of time or longer when the lock-up clutch pressure control SOL.V. is commanded OFF during driving, the PGM-FI ECU judges that the lock-up clutch control SOL.V. is ON sticking, DTC is stored.
Detection frequency, detection sequence, detection time required, detection method type, OBD status

items.text: The total number of engine stalls for 1 and 2 was 3.
Select lever to D or L*. 1 （S）* 2 position, the engine stalled.
Engine stalled during deceleration and stop.

blocks.text: *2: Models equipped with paddle shift switches

items.text: Lock-up clutch control SOL.V. ON sticking
Set the select lever to the P or N position and wait for 10 seconds.
Step on the brake pedal and turn the select lever to the D position.
Drive until the vehicle speed [vehicle speed] reaches 60 km/h.
Repeat test run steps 2 through 5 five times.
If engine stall occurs, repeat driving steps 1 through 5 five times.
When conducting test drives, the driver must comply with all laws and regulations, observe good manners, and drive in accordance with the surrounding conditions.

blocks.text: If the vehicle is determined to have a fault, a temporary DTC is stored in the PGM-FI ECU memory. If the same failure is detected at the next D/C (two consecutive detections), the D indicator light will flash without the PGM-FI warning light illuminating, and the DTC and freeze data will be stored.
Use of the clear command of the scan tool (including HDS) or removal of the 12V battery terminal will clear the D indicator light, temporary DTC, DTC, and freeze data.
